content.problemStatement:
You are given a positive integer NNN.

Consider an array AAA of length NNN. Let PiP_iPi​ denote the sum of the first iii elements of AAA and SiS_iSi​ denote the sum of the last iii elements of AAA.

You need to construct the array AAA of size NNN such that all of the following conditions are met:


−109≤Ai≤109-10^9 \leq A_i \leq 10^9−109≤Ai​≤109, for all (1≤i≤N)(1\le i \le N)(1≤i≤N)
Pi>SiP_i \gt S_iPi​>Si​ if iii is odd, for each (1≤i<N)(1 \leq i \lt N)(1≤i<N)
Pi<SiP_i \lt S_iPi​<Si​ if iii is even, for each (1≤i<N)(1 \leq i \lt N)(1≤i<N)
If there are multiple solutions, you can print any of them.

If there is no such array, print −1-1−1 instead.


Input Format

Each test contains multiple test cases. The first line contains the number of test cases TTT.
The only line of each test case contains a single integer NNN, where NNN is the length of the required array.


Output Format
For each test case, if a **valid** array exists, print NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ satisfying all the given conditions.


If there are multiple solutions, you can print any of them.

If there is no such array, print −1-1−1 instead.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 3⋅1053 \cdot 10^53⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: All elements are in the given range for the array A=[343,−343]A = [343, -343]A=[343,−343].

For i=1i = 1i=1: Since iii is odd, P1=343P_1 = 343P1​=343 is greater than S1=−343S_1 = -343S1​=−343.

Test case 222: It can be proved that no array of length 333 exists satisfying all conditions.
Test case 333: All elements are in the given range for the array A=[0,−5,343,−100]A = [0, -5, 343, -100]A=[0,−5,343,−100].

For i=1i = 1i=1: Since iii is odd, P1=0P_1 = 0P1​=0 is greater than S1=−100S_1 = -100S1​=−100.
For i=2i = 2i=2: Since iii is even, P2=0+(−5)=−5P_2 = 0 + (-5) = -5P2​=0+(−5)=−5 is less than S2=343+(−100)=243S_2 = 343 + (-100) = 243S2​=343+(−100)=243.
For i=3i = 3i=3: Since iii is odd, P3=0+(−5)+343=338P_3 = 0 + (-5) + 343 = 338P3​=0+(−5)+343=338 is greater than S3=(−5)+343+(−100)=238S_3 = (-5)+343 +(-100) = 238S3​=(−5)+343+(−100)=238.
